steps.title: Recognize the required language type
steps.content: The goal demands emphasizing release ORDER — the temporal relationship between 1928 and 1943. This requires language that puts the passage of time in focus.

steps.title: Match language type to the choices
steps.content:
A uses “was released early” and “came out years later” to put the temporal sequence in focus.

The other three either lack temporal emphasis entirely, omit one of the films, or emphasize role-type contrast instead of release timing.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
